Notice Of Motion Seeking Order Setting Time For Plaintiffs' Inspection Of Real Property Jointly Owned By Plaintiffs And Defendants; To Allow Plaintiffs To Enter Inspect, And Photograph The Premises At 1323-1325 15th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca. 94122
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS STEPHEN CHAN, STEPHEN CHAN, ANNA CHAN, HELEN CHAN, NANCY YEETING Motion Seeking Order Setting Time For Plaintiffs' Inspection Of Real Property Jointly Owned By Plaintiffs And Defendants; To Allow Plaintiffs To Enter Inspect, And Photograph The Premises At 1323-1325 15th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca. 94122

PLAINTIFFS STEPHEN CHAN, TRUSTEE OF THE CHAN FAMILY TRUST B, STEPHEN CHAN, ANNA CHAN, HELEN CHAN AND NANCY YEETING'S (HEREAFTER COLLECTIVELY "PLAINTIFFS") MOTION FOR AN ORDER SETTING TIME OF PLAINTIFF'S INSPECTION OF THE PREMISES AT 1323 -1325 15TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 84122 (HEREAFTER REFERRED TO AS "THE PREMISES") AND TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS TO ENTER AND INSPECT AND PHOTOGRAPH THE PREMISES AND FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS QUING XIU TAN (AKA TAM) AND YICHENG CHEN (HEREAFTER "DEFENDANTS" OR "TAN" OR "CHEN") IS UNOPPOSED; ACCORDINGLY THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:

(1) IT IS ORDERED THAT COMMENCING AT 10:00 AM ON DECEMBER 8, 2023 PLAINTIFFS, THEIR COUNSEL AND REAL PROPERTY APPRAISER WILL BE GIVEN UNFETTERED AND UNMOLESTED ACCESS TO THE ENTIRE PREMISES UNTIL NO LATER THAN 4:00 PM ON DECEMBER 8, 2023 AND WILL BE ALLOWED TO TAKE PHOTOGRAPHS AND PREPARE, IF THEY WISH DIAGRAMS AND MAKE NOTES OF THEIR OBSERVATIONS.

(2) PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRECLUSION SANCTIONS IS DENIED.

(3) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR ATTORNEYS IN THE AMOUNT OF TWO THOUSAND DOLLARS ($2,000.00) AGAINST DEFENDANTS AND THEIR ATTORNEY, PAYMENT OF WHICH SHOULD BE MADE WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT BY EMAIL to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

PLAINTIFFS STEPHEN CHAN, ANNA CHAN, HELEN CHAN, NANCY YEETING'S MOTION SEEKING ORDER SETTING TIME FOR PLAINTIFFS' INSPECTION OF REAL PROPERTY JOINTLY OWNED BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS; TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS TO ENTER INSPECT, AND PHOTOGRAPH THE PREMISES AT 1323-1325 15TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94122 (PART 2 OF 2 TENTATIVE RULING PURPOSES ONLY)
